what_it_does: Empty placeholder file whose only purpose is to make git track the otherwise-empty 'atomicity/' directory.
conventions: Follows the git convention of using a .gitkeep file to retain an empty directory under version control
notes: Just a directory-keeper; the only signal is the existence of an 'atomicity/' folder, not the file itself.
questions: What is the 'atomicity/' directory intended to hold, since it is currently empty?
purpose_vs_actual: n/a — a placeholder has no stated purpose beyond keeping the dir
intention_signals: Reserves an 'atomicity' namespace/folder ahead of putting content there, keeping the structure in version control before it is populated.
contribution: Contributes the reserved 'atomicity/' directory slot in the design-system tree.
summary_for_embedding: An empty .gitkeep placeholder retaining an empty 'atomicity' directory in the claude-ds design system.
intention_for_embedding: To keep an empty reserved 'atomicity' directory under git tracking until it is populated.
